prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
This page contains the END of "Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations". The next section is "Item 7A. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk".
Transcribe VERBATIM the last 5 lines of "Item 7" body text before the next item begins:
if the "Item 7A" heading appears on this page, take the 5 lines just before it; otherwise Item 7 continues to the bottom, so take the last 5 lines of the page (ignore running headers, page numbers, footers).
Respond with ONLY a JSON object: {"lines": ["line 1", "line 2", ...]}
